structured_regimens.quote: for the intensive or advanced, you'd want to do it every day for 30 to 60 days and then repeat after six months if needed.

structured_regimens.speaker: Hunter Williams
structured_regimens.quote: Severe Issues / Post-Surgery - 2 mg daily - 30-60 days - Every 3-6 months.
